attacking_style: Exhibits exceptional tactical patience, absorbing multiple attacks on climbs before launching decisive moves inside the final kilometer when rivals are fatigued.
team_tactics: Operates primarily from breakaways with limited visible team support, relying on individual resilience and timing rather than organized lead-outs.
terrain_preference: Cat-1 climbs where recovery ability and yo-yo tactics can be exploited; thrives in attritional finishes where repeated accelerations favor resilient climbers over pure power.
vulnerability: Susceptible to aggressive, sustained KOM hunting tactics from dedicated breakaway riders; struggles when unable to control pace or respond to relentless attacks.
key_patterns: Successfully yo-yos back after being dropped 4+ times, exploiting recovery windows (2 observations)
Attacks inside final kilometer after absorbing attacks, timing moves when rivals fatigued (2 observations)
Operates from breakaways as primary race strategy rather than GC protection (2 observations)
Vulnerable on Cat-1 climbs when facing dedicated KOM competition from breaks (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Won stage via exceptional recovery tactics but subsequently struggled on climbs against aggressive KOM competition within same race
